title: Croatian Pierogi with Pastry Crust
description: A classic Eastern European dish featuring homemade pierogi filled with a traditional Croatian mixture, topped with a crispy pastry crust.

ingredients.name: pirogi dough
ingredients.notes: available at most Eastern European markets

instructions: On a lightly floured surface, roll out the pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of pastry using a biscuit cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of the Croatian filling in the center of each pastry circle.
Fold the pastry in half over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the pierogi on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops of the pierogi with the beaten egg and sprinkle with croissant crumbs.
Bake the pierogi for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the pierogi are baking, mix the sugar and buttery pastry in a small bowl until well combined.
Remove the pierogi from the oven and top each one with a spoonful of the sugar and pastry mixture.
